topic: racking, sediment removal, and controlled oxygen
trigger_keywords: función cumple el trasiego durante la crianza

steps.label: cause
steps.text: Wine is transferred off settled lees or sediment into another clean vessel.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: The transfer separates solids and can introduce a controlled amount of oxygen.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: The wine becomes cleaner while receiving limited aeration that can support maturation when carefully managed.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: The wine becomes cleaner while receiving limited aeration that can support maturation when carefully managed.
